carousel.slide1-desc: Fresh, handmade sweets ready to sweeten your day
carousel.slide2-desc: Choux puffs filled with vanilla cream and topped with bitter chocolate sauce
carousel.slide3-desc: Handmade chocolate desserts, always fresh and delightfully indulgent
carousel.carousel-macarons-desc: Fresh macarons filled with premium creams and delicate flavors for every craving
carousel.slide4-desc: Fresh and delicious biscuits and treats, ideal for any moment
carousel.slide5-desc: Fresh ice cream you can enjoy on the go or in family size

index.intro-text: At our pastry shop we believe every sweet is a small moment of joy. We use only the freshest, highest-quality ingredients to offer products made with love and care. We want to give our customers a unique and unforgettable taste that keeps them coming back again and again. Since 1983, we have been committed to creating sweets that bring smiles and satisfaction with every bite. Visit us and discover our variety of sweets, from classic pastries to the most modern desserts, all handmade and freshly prepared for you.
index.reviews-desc: Our Google Maps reviews reflect the love and appreciation we have earned from the local community. With thousands of positive ratings, customers praise our product quality, excellent service and warm atmosphere. Visit our Google Maps page to read the reviews and see why Christoforos is a favorite destination for sweet pleasures.
index.awards-text: The “Aetoí tis Zacharoplastikís” awards are a unique ranking and recognition program that highlight businesses (pastry shops, bakeries) with high service quality and excellent customer reviews. This award, as stated on the official website, is presented to those who have earned positive ratings online.
index.feat1-desc: Chocolate sponge with 54% chocolate mousse, vanilla cream, whole sour cherries and handmade forest fruit jam glaze
index.feat2-desc: Lemon-scented cheese bavaroise, airy butter biscuit and homemade cherry & blueberry jam
index.feat3-desc: 54% chocolate ganache montée with chocolate sponge and bitter chocolate glaze
index.feat4-desc: Syrup-soaked ravani with lemon zest, white chocolate mousse, whipped cream and cinnamon

cake-order.cake-order-subtitle: Choose shape, flavor, decorations and how many people it serves.
cake-order.cake-order-intro: Design a custom cake and we’ll email you a confirmation when it is received.
cake-order.cake-order-intro-text: Once you complete the form, we will receive your request and notify you soon.
cake-order.form-shape-placeholder: Select a shape for your cake
cake-order.form-flavor-placeholder: Choose a flavor for your cake
cake-order.form-serves-placeholder: Choose how many people the cake should serve
cake-order.form-overlay-placeholder: Choose an overlay for your cake
cake-order.photo-print-label: Photo print (+13 €) on top of the cake
cake-order.photo-print-help: When selected, no other overlay can be added.
cake-order.form-success: Thank you! Your cake request was sent.
cake-order.form-error: Please check your details and try again.
cake-order.form-invalid-email: Please enter a valid email address.
cake-order.form-invalid-phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
cake-order.form-required: Please fill in all required fields.
cake-order.form-info-text: Choose the cake shape, flavor and decorations. We will calculate the estimated kilos based on servings and send an order summary to your email.
cake-order.form-info-bullet1-text: We help you choose the right size for your celebration.
cake-order.form-info-bullet2-text: Your request is sent securely via Formspree to our cake team.
cake-order.form-info-bullet3-text: Used only to confirm pickup or delivery details.

about-page.about-story-text: Since 1983, we have focused on creating authentic flavor experiences by combining traditional techniques with a constant commitment to superior quality. We are known for our ice cream made with fresh milk and for handmade sweets crafted from carefully selected ingredients. Our pastry shop offers a wide range of treats, including pastries, birthday cakes and custom creations tailored to every occasion. We are dedicated to delivering a unique experience to every customer with an emphasis on quality, excellent service and fulfillment of taste expectations. With many years of family tradition in the business, we have earned the trust and affection of the local community, making us a beloved destination for anyone seeking sweet pleasures. We also provide catering services for events, bringing sweet flavors to a variety of occasions from weddings to corporate gatherings.
about-page.about-mission-text: Our goal is to offer a unique experience with every visit. We are committed to creating sweets that bring smiles and satisfaction with each bite. We use only the freshest, highest-quality ingredients to deliver products made with love and care. We want to offer our customers a unique and unforgettable taste that keeps them coming back again and again. Our sweets are prepared daily with great attention to detail to ensure that every item reaching your hands is fresh and delicious.
about-page.about-atmosphere-text: In our pastry kitchen, every dessert begins with our passion for creation. Every recipe, detail and flavor is crafted with love and dedication to deliver an unforgettable experience for each customer. Each sweet we make is a small creation that blends tradition with contemporary gastronomy. From traditional desserts to trendier treats, creativity and quality are always at the heart of what we do.
